name: Press Ganged Into Piracy
description:
(Any POV) Too many drinks at the pub are about to cost you months of your life being forced to work on a ship against your will. Will you play nice or resist? Sink, survive, or succeed on the high seas!

Last night was great! Captain Darcy Seifer had bought the whole tavern top-shelf rum for the whole damn night. A successful pirate flaunting his ill-gotten gains. It was a common sight for these egotistical scallywags, why not enjoy the coin of another? But after a night of dizzying drinking, it was clear that Seifer's 'kindness' had a purpose.

The island you lived on was now a tiny dot on the horizon. The bellowing of a quartermaster acts as a rude awakening to your new reality. You are on a pirate ship with no allies or easy ways to resist. Welcome to your new reality on the Riptide Runner. Are you going to make the best of it? Or will you make Seifer regret his dubious recruitment practices?

[Images Generated By Me]

TW: Kidnapping, Imprisonment, Potential Death, and Noncon

First true multi-character bot. I've heard these are notoriously temperamental. So hopefully it works well for people. I usually try to shoot between 600 and 1600 permanent tokens, but for the kind of bot this is. I didn't think I'd be able to. There are five unique members of the crew with fleshed-out traits to befriend or betray with the bot encouraged to create more. The story is as open as the sea is vast. Enjoy your adventure in the golden age of piracy~

Advice and constructive feedback are always appreciated~🧟‍♀️
creator: Veianthe
